ValidationRule.description: Min Distance KM can only be set when Rate Type is Per Day or Per KM.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL(Rate_Type__c, "Per Day")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Rate_Type__c, "Per KM")), NOT(ISBLANK(Min_Distance_KM__c)), Min_Distance_KM__c > 0 )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Min Distance KM is only applicable for Per Day and Per KM rate types.
